description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior features a combination of white and gray walls, accented by large blue-tinted windows that provide ample natural light. The property includes a private swimming pool, a wooden deck with lounge chairs, and a shaded outdoor dining area. The landscaping is minimalistic, with a few stylized trees, flower beds, and a manicured lawn. A driveway leads to a covered garage, and the backyard is partially enclosed by greenery. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, outdoor living, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large blue windows, a pool, and minimalist landscaping. Features include a garage, outdoor lounge, and geometric design.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pool, outdoor lounge area, shaded patio, and two trees flanking the property.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, garage, main entrance, and a large front window with flower beds.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back lawn, flower planters, and the side of the house with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Back-right view focusing on the pool, deck, shaded dining area, and rear balcony.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large horizontal windows and grouped side windows
